scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,bridge -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm:dev -w apps/server" "npm:dev -w apps/web" "bash -lc 'source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn --app-dir apps/ai-bridge main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${AI_BRIDGE_PORT:-8001} --reload'"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
